title: Information Assurance Standard — NZ Digital Government
description: Establishes information management controls to ensure entity information collected is accurate, distinctive, and suitable for authoritative decisions on eligibility or capability. Defines four assurance levels with controls for information risk assessment, protection, accuracy verification, evidence quality, and fraud detection.
